children.name: Drymonema
children.description: Drymonema — a genus of drymonematid jellyfish in the family Drymonematidae.

children.name: Drymonema dalmatinum
children.description: Drymonema dalmatinum — a species in the genus Drymonema, family Drymonematidae. Also known as drymonematid jellyfish.

children.name: Drymonema gorgo
children.description: Drymonema gorgo — a species in the genus Drymonema, family Drymonematidae. Also known as drymonematid jellyfish.
